basic_details.job_title: SCDD Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Coordinators, State Programme Manager and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: State Programme Manager, Coordinators, District Coordinators
basic_details.short_information: Scheduled Castes Development Department (SCDD) has released the official State Programme Manager, Coordinators, and District Coordinators Recruitment 2026 notification. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced under the SCDD Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 40 years for State Programme Manager, up to 35 years for State Level Coordinators, and up to 30 years for District Coordinators, with a Master's Degree in the prescribed disciplines and proficiency in English, Hindi, and Malayalam, can apply online on or before 27-07-2026. The official notification PDF and online application l

age_limit.age_details: Upto 40 years for State Programme Manager, Upto 35 years for Coordinators, Upto 30 years for District Coordinators.
age_limit.details: State Programme Manager: Upto 40 years Coordinators (State Level): Upto 35 years District Coordinators: Upto 30 years

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Social Work/Public Administration/Rural Development/Management/Economics or any other recognized discipline
qualification.details: State Programme Manager: Master's Degree in Social Work/Public Administration/Rural Development/Management/Economics or any other recognized discipline from a recognized University (Ph.D. in a relevant field desirable). Proficiency in English, Hindi and Malayalam. Coordinators (State Level): Master's Degree in Social Work/Rural Development/Public Administration/Management/Economics or any other recognized discipline from a recognized University. Proficiency in English, Hindi and Malayalam. District Coordinators: Master's Degree in Social Work/Rural Development/Arts/Commerce/Management (any discipline) from a recognized University. Proficiency in English, Hindi and Malayalam.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SCDD Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SCDD to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.scheduled_castes_development_department_: State Programme Manager, Coordinators, District Coordinators

content_sections.heading: SCDD Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the SCDD Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download SCDD Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SCDD Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: State Programme Manager: Master's Degree in Social Work/Public Administration/Rural Development/Management/Economics or any other recognized discipline from a recognized University (Ph.D. in a relevant field desirable). Proficiency in English, Hindi and Malayalam. Coordinators (State Level): Master's Degree in Social Work/Rural Development/Public Administration/Management/Economics or any other recognized discipline from a recognized University. Proficiency in English, Hindi and Malayalam. District Coordinators: Master's Degree in Social Work/Rural Development/Arts/Commerce/Management (any discipline) from a recognized University. Proficiency in English, Hindi and Malayalam.

content_sections.heading: SCDD Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: State Programme Manager: Upto 40 years Coordinators (State Level): Upto 35 years District Coordinators: Upto 30 years

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SCDD Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SCDD to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SCDD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the SCDD recruitment is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in SCDD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 10 vacancies are available for the posts of State Programme Manager, Coordinators (State Level), and District Coordinators in the Scheduled Castes Development Department.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in relevant disciplines such as Social Work, Public Administration, Rural Development, Management, or Economics. Proficiency in English, Hindi, and Malayalam is also required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the SCDD posts?
faq.answer: The age limit varies by post: up to 40 years for State Programme Manager, up to 35 years for Coordinators (State Level), and up to 30 years for District Coordinators.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the SCDD positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 35,000 per month, depending on the specific post applied for and the candidate's qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for SCDD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official SCDD website to fill out and submit their application forms.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SCDD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, according to the notification, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the SCDD posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Proficiency Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the positions.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are offered on a contract basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as specified by the Scheduled Castes Development Department.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found in the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to download and read the official notification before applying.
